marketTrends: Multi-peptide blends becoming table stakes (KLOW, recovery stacks, cognitive stacks)
Premium pricing justified by convenience + synergistic effects vs. single compounds
Quality verification (Janoshik reports, COAs) now expected by educated consumers
Research-backed positioning replacing generic supplement marketing
Outcome-based product discovery improving conversion vs. ingredient-focused navigation
consumerInsights: Chronic pain sufferers desperate for alternatives to opioids and surgery
Dosing confusion creates need for clear protocols and cycling guidance
Convenience valued: pre-blended vials preferred over mixing multiple compounds
Results speed matters: 10-day timeline creates urgency and reduces skepticism
Weight loss peptide users seeking injury prevention during increased activity
Trust signals required: independent testing, public COAs, comparison data
